name: ExtensionEvidenceReport_RelatedIdentifier
title: R5: Identifiers for articles that may relate to more than one evidence report (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Identifiers for articles that may relate to more than one evidence report (new)
element.comment:
Element `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.relatedIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
May include trial registry identifiers, e.g. NCT04372602 from clinicaltrials.gov. This identifier can be valid for multiple EvidenceReport resources.

element.short: Identifiers for articles that may relate to more than one evidence report
element.definition: A formal identifier that is used to identify things closely related to this EvidenceReport.
element.comment: May include trial registry identifiers, e.g. NCT04372602 from clinicaltrials.gov. This identifier can be valid for multiple EvidenceReport resources.
